x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A fee charged for specific customer transactions.

Comment:
Example:

ATM withdrawal fee

Fund transfer fee

Card payment fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Maintenance Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Service / Maintenance Fee Feature: A fee charged for ongoing account or product maintenance.

Comment:
Example:

Monthly account maintenance fee

Annual credit card membership fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Penalty Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A fee charged for failure to meet contractual obligations or deadlines.

Comment:
Example:

Late payment fee on a loan or credit card

Overdraft fee for exceeding account balance

x-enumeration-literals.name: Subscription Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Subscription / Access Fee Feature: A periodic fee charged for access to premium services or benefits.

Comment:
Example:

Subscription fee for online banking premium features

Annual fee for access to concierge or exclusive services

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usage-Based Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A fee based on the extent or frequency of product usage.

Comment:
Example:

Charges for exceeding a number of free transactions per month

Fee per international wire transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A fee applied to cover regulatory, legal, or compliance costs imposed by authorities.

Comment:
Example:

Stamp duty on securities transactions

KYC verification fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Variable Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A fee structure where the amount or rate of the fee varies based on tiers, balances, or customer segments.

Comment:
Example:

Higher fees for lower account balances

Reduced fees for premium customers or loyalty tiers

x-enumeration-literals.name: One-Time Fee Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
One-Time / Setup Fee Feature: A single fee charged at the initiation of a product or service.

Comment:
Example:

Loan processing fee

Account opening fee
